"use client" import Link from 'next/link' import { ArrowLeft, ArrowUpRight } from "lucide-react" import { CustomCursor } from '@/components/ui/CustomCursor' export default function RootNotFound() { return (
{/* Texture Overlay (Grain/Noise) */}
{/* Elemento de Design de Fundo - Dramatic 404 */}
404
Error

P├ígina N├úo Encontrada

O endere├ºo que voc├¬ busca segue em outra dire├º├úo.
A p├ígina n├úo existe ou foi movida.

{/* Quick Nav Suggestions */}
{[ { label: "In├¡cio", href: "/pt" }, { label: "Cases", href: "/pt/cases" }, { label: "Sobre", href: "/pt/sobre" }, ].map((item) => ( {item.label} ))}
) }

messages.message: Unused eslint-disable directive (no problems were reported from '@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any').
Unused eslint-disable directive (no problems were reported from 'prefer-const').
Unused eslint-disable directive (no problems were reported from 'react/no-unescaped-entities').

suggestions.desc: Remove unused import declaration.

source:
/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any, @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, prefer-const, react/no-unescaped-entities, react-hooks/exhaustive-deps, @next/next/no-img-element, jsx-a11y/alt-text */ "use client" import { DotPattern } from "@/components/animations/DotPattern" import { FadeIn } from "@/components/animations/FadeIn" import Link from "next/link" import { ArrowRight } from "lucide-react" import { useTranslations } from "next-intl" import { motion } from "framer-motion" export function CTA() { const tHome = useTranslations("Home") return (

{tHome("cta.title_pt1")}
{" "} {tHome("cta.title_pt2")} {tHome("cta.estrategico")},{" "}
{tHome("cta.solido")} {tHome("cta.e")} {tHome("cta.memoravel")}?

{tHome("cta.description")}

{tHome("cta.button")}
) }
